mapper.sql: o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.bike_id, o.start_time, o.end_time, o.start_lng, o.start_lat, o.end_lng, o.end_lat, o.duration, o.amount, o.status, o.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bike_order WHERE DATE(start_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bike_order WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bike_order (order_no, user_id, bike_id, start_time, start_lng, start_lat, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{bikeId}, #{startTime}, #{startLng}, #{startLat}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT , b.bike_code FROM bike_order o LEFT JOIN bike b ON o.bike_id = b.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT , b.bike_code FROM bike_order o LEFT JOIN bike b ON o.bike_id = b.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bike_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(start_time) = CURDATE() AND status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM bike_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(start_time) = CURDATE() AND status = 1
